findings: Unqualified opinion. Emphasis of matter on system losses and IPP contract obligations. Three management letter points on revenue assurance, smart metering controls, and IT general controls.
recommendations: Implement revenue assurance framework; strengthen smart meter data validation; upgrade IT access management controls.
managementResponse: Revenue assurance team established. Smart meter validation protocols implemented. IT access review completed.

findings: Audit in progress. Going concern emphasis of matter expected given negative equity position. Debt restructuring disclosures under review.
managementResponse: KQ engaging with auditors on going concern disclosures and debt restructuring accounting treatment.

findings: Unqualified opinion. Two management letter points on port revenue reconciliation and contractor performance monitoring.
recommendations: Implement automated revenue reconciliation system; strengthen contractor KPI monitoring framework.
managementResponse: Automated reconciliation system procured. Contractor performance dashboard implemented.

findings: Unqualified opinion. One management letter point on taxpayer data security controls following a minor data access incident in Q2 2024.
recommendations: Implement enhanced data access logging and monitoring; conduct annual cybersecurity penetration testing.
managementResponse: Enhanced access logging implemented. Penetration testing contract awarded to Serianu Limited.

findings: Audit in progress. NSSF Act 2023 implementation accounting treatment under review. Investment portfolio valuation methodology being assessed.
managementResponse: NSSF engaging with auditors on NSSF Act 2023 accounting treatment and investment valuation.
